=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 2003.02.06 Canberra, Australia, 2CDR

Same fingerprints described for the other circulating complete recording.
Great sound

CD1

1 intro + Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 2 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on slide guitar), 3 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 4 I'll Remember You (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on slide guitar), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Brown Sugar (song by Mick Jagger and Keith Richards) (Bob on piano), 7 Saving Grace (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 8 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on guitar then piano and harp, and Tony on standup bass), 9 Sugar Baby (Bob on piano and harp and Tony on standup bass), 10 Drifter's Escape (Bob on electric guitar),

CD2

1 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) (Bob on guitar and then piano and harp, Larry on slide guitar and Tony on standup bass), 2 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and harp, 3 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic), 4 Masters Of War (acoustic), 5 Forever Young (acoustic), 6 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass and Bob on piano), (encore), 7 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 8 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on electric guitar) 


Concert # 1491 of The Never-Ending Tour. First concert of the 2003 Tour Down Under. First 2003 concert.
First concert with the 15th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Bill Burnette (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

8, 13-15, 17 acoustic with the band.
1-11 Bob Dylan (piano).
8  Bob Dylan (harmonica).
2, 4, 7 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
8, 13 Larry Campbell (cittern).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
